relationships.description: Financial mismanagement and bookkeeping errors directly necessitate the decision to replace or remediate the bookkeeper function

relationships.description: The decision to replace or remediate the bookkeeper requires a formal performance review and capability assessment as a prerequisite
relationships.reasoningBrief: ACT002 provides the documented evidence needed to justify DEC001.

relationships.description: Resolving the 930+ day reconciliation backlog directly supports the finance committee's commitment to establishing clear financial controls and accurate P&L reporting
relationships.reasoningBrief: ACT001 is the operational implementation of COM001's financial control commitments.

relationships.description: The decision to establish formal job descriptions and governance requires creating documented job descriptions with clear responsibilities and authority
relationships.reasoningBrief: ACT004 is the direct implementation requirement of DEC002.

relationships.description: The decision to establish formal job descriptions and governance infrastructure aligns with leadership's commitment to implementing comprehensive governance infrastructure
relationships.reasoningBrief: DEC002 operationalizes the governance commitments in COM002.

relationships.description: Legal and compliance risks from lack of formal policies and documented decision-making directly necessitate establishing formal governance and job descriptions
relationships.reasoningBrief: RISK003 is the primary driver for DEC002's governance requirements.

relationships.description: Director burnout risk from unsustainable workload and underpaid compensation directly necessitates the decision to rationalize cost structure and realign Director compensation
relationships.reasoningBrief: RISK002 is the primary driver for DEC003's compensation adjustment.

relationships.description: The decision to rationalize cost structure requires increasing Director compensation from $40/hour to sustainable salary level
relationships.reasoningBrief: ACT003 is the direct implementation of DEC003's compensation decision.

relationships.description: Delegating transactional administrative work from Director reduces the Director's unsustainable 30+ hour/week workload, mitigating burnout risk
relationships.reasoningBrief: DEC004 directly addresses the workload component of RISK002.

relationships.description: The commitment to build administrative infrastructure through documented processes is operationalized through creating formal written job descriptions
relationships.reasoningBrief: ACT004 is part of the infrastructure-building commitment in COM003.

relationships.description: Loss of organizational knowledge and operational paralysis risk necessitates delegating administrative work and clarifying organizational structure
relationships.reasoningBrief: RISK004 is mitigated by DEC004's focus on clarity and delegation.

relationships.description: Renegotiating subsidy relationships and addressing unpaid invoices supports the finance committee's commitment to establishing clear financial controls and accurate reporting
relationships.reasoningBrief: ACT005 resolves financial relationship issues that impact COM001's control objectives.
